name: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York
description_short: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York provides liquidity and funding services to member financial institutions to support housing and community development lending.
description_long: The Federal Home Loan Bank of New York (FHLBNY) is a cooperative bank established to serve member financial institutions across New York State and surrounding regions. As one of 11 Federal Home Loan Banks in the United States, it operates under a government-chartered mandate to promote housing finance and economic stability. FHLBNY offers member financial institutions access to reliable, on-demand liquidity through various funding programs. Key offerings include the Mortgage Asset Program (MAP®), a secondary market outlet that allows member lenders to fund mortgages competitively while offering fixed-rate mortgage products. The bank also provides education programs on strategic planning, economic trends, technology, mergers and acquisitions, and leadership development tailored to member needs. Additionally, members can access the Homebuyer Dream Program® Suite to support affordable housing initiatives. FHLBNY distinguishes itself through its member-focused cooperative model, providing not just capital but strategic advisory services and market intelligence. The organization publishes regular financial updates, hosts member symposiums covering economic and industry trends, and offers flexible funding solutions designed for neighborhood lenders. In 2024, the Federal Home Loan Bank System committed a record $1.2 billion to housing and economic development initiatives. Instead, it serves as a wholesale funding source for member banks and credit unions, who then offer retail products to consumers. Individual homebuyers and borrowers must work through member institutions to access FHLBNY-supported programs. This is a specialized B2B financial service, not a consumer-facing mortgage or banking platform.
pros: Provides reliable on-demand liquidity to member lenders, supporting increased local lending activity and financial stability
Mortgage Asset Program (MAP®) offers members flexibility and transparency in funding mortgages with competitive fixed-rate products
Strong dividend performance with 7.60% annualized dividend declared for Q4 2025, demonstrating financial strength
Comprehensive education programs and strategic planning sessions tailored to member institution leadership and business goals
Published market intelligence and weekly financial updates to help members navigate economic conditions
Cooperative member-focused model ensuring alignment with neighborhood lender priorities
Record $1.2 billion committed to housing and economic development in 2024, demonstrating mission impact
cons: Not a direct consumer lender—individual borrowers cannot apply for mortgages or loans directly; access only through member institutions
Requires institutional membership to access services; not available to general public or small non-member organizations
Limited public transparency on specific loan terms, rates, and member eligibility criteria on website
best_for: Banks and credit unions seeking reliable liquidity sources to fund mortgages and local development lending
Member financial institutions looking for competitive secondary market outlets for mortgage products
Lenders seeking strategic advisory services and market intelligence on economic trends and industry developments
diagnosis: FHLBNY is exclusively a wholesale funding bank for member financial institutions, not a consumer lender. It is best for banks, credit unions, and mortgage lenders seeking liquidity and strategic support. Individual consumers cannot apply directly; they must work through member institutions to access FHLBNY-supported mortgage and lending products.
services: Mortgage Asset Program (MAP®) secondary market funding for member lenders
On-demand liquidity and funding services to support housing and community development lending
Tailored education programs on economy, housing, technology, mergers and acquisitions, and leadership
Strategic planning sessions for member institution leadership teams
Market intelligence and financial updates (weekly MSD Market Updates)
Homebuyer Dream Program® Suite participation coordination
Member symposiums featuring economic and industry expert perspectives
SEC-compliant financial reporting and dividend distribution to member shareholders
Banking access platform (FHLBNY Access, 1LinkSK, MAP® platform)
Housing and economic development initiatives and grant programs
meta_description: Federal Home Loan Bank of New York provides liquidity and funding services to member institutions supporting housing and community development.
